personalInfo.name: Bogdan-Madalin Fintina
personalInfo.title: Agnostic Software Engineer
personalInfo.summary: I have always enjoyed solving problems, which is one of the reasons why I started programming. During my journey, I have had the opportunity to learn a wide array of languages, technologies, tools, and processes. My general opinion is that every language has its purpose. It all boils down to what problems you are trying to solve. Lately I have been leaning deeply into AI-assisted engineering: designing custom AI skills, context management tooling, and agent workflows that help teams move faster, stay aligned, and focus on the parts of the work that actually need a human. I genuinely enjoy exploring where pragmatic engineering meets thoughtful use of AI, and I am always happy to share what I learn along the way.

highlights.text: I am building features on the QRCG product, leaning into a TypeScript / React / Next.js front end backed by Golang services on AWS.
I am helping move our platform off a legacy PHP API onto a modern Golang one, paying down years of architectural debt as we go.
Alongside the team, I am crafting custom AI skills and context-management tooling that genuinely speed up our day-to-day work.
Improved test coverage and code quality by adding unit tests and refactoring legacy modules.
Introduced design and architecture patterns that made the codebase easier to extend and maintain.
Integrated Symfony as a new stack component, improving code quality, maintainability, and future-proofing the system.
Designed and shipped a service that talks to the ANAF e-Transport API, enabling seamless data exchange and Romanian regulatory compliance.
Architected a service that submits invoice data to Hungarian authorities, automating compliance with local tax rules.
Achieved a 174% increase in API responsiveness by tuning database queries, backend processes, and MQTT communication.
Led the transition to Symfony for the IoT platform, picking it for its robust architecture and ecosystem fit.
Introduced Golang (ChirpStack) to the stack for lightweight, high-performance IoT workloads.
Stood up RabbitMQ and MQTT-based messaging plus Jenkins deployment pipelines to streamline releases.
Provided technical leadership and mentorship to junior team members, holding the line on best practices.
Worked end-to-end across React, Node.js, Laravel, Vue.js, and VTEX.
Optimized application performance and scalability through cleaner code, better architecture, and the right tooling.
Integrated third-party platforms such as VTEX to deliver smooth e-commerce experiences.
Led a team of 3 developers shipping efficient web applications.
Built on PHP 7.4, Symfony, MySQL, Redis, Podman, Kibana, and Elasticsearch.
Set strategic planning methodologies and clear goals to optimize team workflow.
Mentored developers and used performance metrics to improve scalability and reliability.
Joined a new team tasked with migrating a monolith to microservices.
Redesigned the pricing mechanism end-to-end using two microservices.
Built a bridge microservice between the legacy system and the new architecture.
Shipped a pricing-calculation microservice based on time intervals, base price, and various data points (PHP 7.4, Symfony, MySQL, RabbitMQ, Yii2).
Maintained CI/CD tooling (Jenkins, Drone.io, SonarQube) for the Internal Apps and Processes division.
Maintained the Selenium grid backing all acceptance and integration testing.
Developed an acceptance-testing platform on Codeception, a data-propagation verification tool, and a technical scoring system.
Wrote servlets for a self-healing Selenium grid on Kubernetes; picked up Helm, Kibana, and Grafana along the way.
Designed system architecture with the team lead and shipped multiple APIs and microservices.
Built internal interfaces for advertising and customer support teams to boost productivity.
Integrated payment processors, gateways, and external antifraud layers.
Implemented Redis-backed content caching and Jenkins pipelines via Groovy.
Took over an internal mentoring platform from an offshore team and shipped it to completion.
Migrated the backend from plain PHP to Symfony with Doctrine.
Closed security gaps left by earlier architectural choices.
Successfully retrofitted Symfony into a project that was already 90% built.
Built WordPress custom plugins and addons for a range of clients.
Maintained a legacy codebase and ran code reviews to support team growth.
Rewrote project backends, moving logic into WordPress plugins and Visual Composer addons.
Picked up Twig, Symfony 2.8, Doctrine, Docker, Git, and got my first real taste of React.
Built and maintained a real-estate agency platform.
Implemented APIs that auto-published listings to property portals.
Integrated platforms such as imobiliare.ro, titirez.ro, storia.ro, and homezz.ro.
Learned WordPress core, plugin and theme development, jQuery, and Bootstrap.
Created graphics for magazines, flyers, and marketing materials.
Published new properties on real-estate platforms.
Picked up HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP, and MySQL on the job.
Implemented APIs into the real-estate platform.

education.institution: Udemy and various online teaching platforms
Colegiul national de arte Regina Maria
